title: v9 — AI Benchmark Forecast (Hitchens/Munk doctrine)
description: Foundry council debates where AI benchmarks land in April 2028. Full debate doctrine — listener stakes hook, House motion, For/Against/Swing casting, Hitchens-style metaphors. Voice cast: Tanaka, Kurogane (Japanese accent), Mercer, Storm narrator, Juliet moderator.
